intended_use: The multifunctional ultrasound scanner MyLabX90 is used to collect, display, and analyze ultrasound images during ultrasound imaging procedures in combination with supported echographic probes.
intended_use_full: The multifunctional ultrasound scanner MyLabX90 is used to collect, display, and analyze ultrasound images during ultrasound imaging procedures in combination with supported echographic probes.
target_condition: Left ventricular function assessment; cardiac imaging
ground_truth: LV endocardium blood pool segmentation annotated by cardiologists following expert guidelines; annotations performed using customized CAAS Qardia 1.0 application
other_metrics: Mean Dice coefficient: 0.95 (standard deviation 0.02) for A2C/A4C algorithm on 200 individually segmented frames

recalls.reason: A potential weakness has been identified in the probe body, so that, in a specific production batch, liquid may leak from the terminal part of the casing near the cable.
recalls.product_description: Esaote Endocavity ultrasonic probe, Model E 3-12, REF 120000038
